basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) has officially announced the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy. The detailed notification was published on 20 July 2026 at the official website. Candidates with a maximum age of 33 years and an MBBS qualification are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their online applications up to 28 July 2026, and the walk-in interview is scheduled for 05 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are provided below.

application_fee.pwd_fee: Not required to pay again if already paid for Advt. No. 1440/E-12015/24/26-(SR/T/JR) dated 24.06.2026

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 33 years as on the date of publishing this notification. 10 years relaxation for PwBD candidates.

qualification.details: MBBS from an Institution recognized by NMC. Must have completed compulsory internship and possess an internship completion certificate. Must possess registration under any state medical council. Candidates who passed MBBS (including Internship) not earlier than 03 years before the start date of Junior Residency (28th July, 2026) will be considered. Candidates who have already done 2 terms* of Junior Residency (Non-Academic) either at AIIMS or outside will not be considered. Experience in Army services, Central Health Services, Private Nursing Homes & Private practice will be taken as equivalent to Junior Residency (Non-Academic).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.15,600-39,100+GP 5,400 (6th CPC) / Level 10 of the Pay Matrix of the Seventh Pay Commission + NPA for Medical Graduates
salary_details.details: Rs.15,600-39,100+GP 5,400 (6th CPC) Level 10 of the Pay Matrix of the Seventh Pay Commission + NPA for Medical Graduates

selection_process: Written Exam and/or Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: MBBS from an Institution recognized by NMC. Must have completed compulsory internship and possess an internship completion certificate. Must possess registration under any state medical council. Candidates who passed MBBS (including Internship) not earlier than 03 years before the start date of Junior Residency (28th July, 2026) will be considered. Candidates who have already done 2 terms* of Junior Residency (Non-Academic) either at AIIMS or outside will not be considered. Experience in Army services, Central Health Services, Private Nursing Homes & Private practice will be taken as equivalent to Junior Residency (Non-Academic).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts at AIIMS Kalyani is 28th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) position is MBBS from an institution recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC). Candidates must also have completed their compulsory internship.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 33 years as of the notification date. There is a relaxation of 10 years for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Kalyani Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000/- for Unreserved, SC/ST/OBC/EWS categories. PwBD candidates do not need to pay again if they have already paid for a previous advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Exam and/or Walk-in Interview, followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs.15,600-39,100+GP 5,400 (6th CPC) or Level 10 of the Pay Matrix of the Seventh Pay Commission + NPA for Medical Graduates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Kalyani located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is located in Kalyani, West Bengal, with the pincode 741245.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates who have already completed Junior Residency apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who have already completed two terms of Junior Residency (Non-Academic) either at AIIMS or elsewhere will not be considered for this position.
